title: How to Add Advanced Dynamic Pricing for WooCommerce 2023
description:
Discover how to easily add advanced dynamic pricing capabilities to your WooCommerce store with the free plugin, Advanced Dynamic Pricing for WooCommerce. In this step-by-step tutorial, you'll learn how to create complex pricing rules based on categories, quantities, user roles, and more, without the need for premium plugins.

With Advanced Dynamic Pricing for WooCommerce, you can set up category-based pricing, quantity-based discounts, and role-based discounts effortlessly. Watch as we guide you through the process of installing and activating the plugin, configuring various pricing rules, and customizing settings to suit your specific needs.

https://wordpress.org/plugins/advanced-dynamic-pricing-for-woocommerce/

In this video, I will introduce three types of discount rules: Product Discount, Bulk Discount, and Role Discount.

The first type is the Product Discount rule, which is perfect for applying simple discounts. For example, you can set a 30% discount on a specific product or category. This rule is ideal for attracting customers with enticing discounts on selected items.

The second type is the Bulk Discount rule. This type allows you to offer discounts based on the quantity of products purchased. For instance, you can set a 10% discount when customers buy 2 to 4 products and a 20% discount when they buy 5 to 7 products. Bulk discounts are a great way to incentivize customers to purchase more items from your store.

Lastly, we have the Role Discount rule, which enables you to provide discounts exclusively to specific user roles. For example, you can offer a 30% discount only to customers who have registered accounts on your website. This type of discount is an excellent way to reward loyal customers and encourage repeat purchases.

Enhance your WooCommerce store's pricing strategy and offer personalized discounts to your customers, all with the power of Advanced Dynamic Pricing for WooCommerce. Join us in this video tutorial and take your WooCommerce store to the next level.
